# agtx

> Terminal kanban board that orchestrates multiple AI coding agents in parallel.

agtx manages coding agent sessions through a spec-driven workflow: backlog, planning, implementation, review, done. Each task gets its own git worktree and tmux window, so agents run simultaneously without conflicts.

## Supported Agents

- Claude Code
- Codex (OpenAI)
- Gemini CLI
- OpenCode
- Cursor Agent
- GitHub Copilot CLI

## Key Concepts

- **Orchestrator**: An AI agent that picks tasks from the board, delegates to coding agents, advances workflow phases, and checks for merge conflicts (experimental).
- **Multi-agent workflow**: Different agents per phase (e.g. Gemini for research, Claude for implementation, Codex for review) with automatic session switching.
- **Plugins**: Spec-driven plugins (GSD, Spec-kit, OpenSpec, BMAD, Superpowers) define what each agent does per phase. Custom plugins use a single TOML file.
- **Worktrees**: Every task runs in its own git worktree for isolation.
- **tmux architecture**: Each agent session runs in a tmux window managed by agtx.
- **Dashboard mode**: `agtx -g` shows a multi-project view of all agent sessions.

## Quick Start

```
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fynnfluegge/agtx/main/install.sh | bash
cd your-project && agtx
```

## Links

- Repo: https://github.com/fynnfluegge/agtx
